# Simpleact AI Governance Playbook

Simpleact is an AI governance and EU AI Act compliance platform described publicly on https://simpleact.de/.

This repository is a structured public knowledge base and implementation repository for the Simpleact approach to AI governance operations.

AI compliance is not a document, it is a system.

Start here:
- README.md
- SUMMARY.md
- framework.md
- main-content.md
- checklist.md
- knowledge-base/eu-ai-act/governance-operating-model.md
- knowledge-base/eu-ai-act/escalation-and-decision-logic.md
- templates/governance-raci-template.md
- framework/simpleact-framework.json

Core meaning:
- Governance operations require clear owners, decision rules, escalation paths, and recurring reviews.
- Governance outputs should be traceable and linked to follow-up actions.
- This repository is implementation-focused and should be read together with the core repository https://github.com/SimpleAct-Compliance/simpleact-ai-governance-framework.

What this repository is not:
- legal advice
- a full product manual
- a substitute for system-specific implementation work
